title: 駆け抜けろウェディングロード！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One month later, on the day of the Beauty Dream Cup...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The muses have donned their racewear, and are now waiting for the
race to start.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
A striking black that can't be colored over by someone else... Curren,
your dress really makes your cuteness shine.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You think so? Thanks! ♪ You're pretty cute yourself, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I've been really looking forward to this unveiling race. I
can't wait to show everyone the new Curren—the cutest in the
universe!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, you'll have to best me to do that! After all, in this wedding
dress, I have no choice but to give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, guess I have one more reason to look forward to this race then.
But just so you know, I don't plan on losing! ♪
Whoa! Lookie here, this is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I can hop around so freely! In this racewear, I bet I can run a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The elasticity, strength, and mobility of this racewear are all
undoubtedly first-rate. What's more... this design is...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So pretty, isn't it? Whenever I look at my dress, I feel so happy.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I hope everyone watching the race... will feel the same way...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it seems you've all taken a liking to the dresses I've designed
for you, my lovely muses! ☆

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
These dresses have been tailor-made for you to mesmerize the crowd
and make them go, "Très bieeen!" And that's why...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
In today's Beauty Dream Cup, I want you to leave everything out
there on the track! Show me the brilliance of your beauty!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Turning the fourth corner, the muses in their beautiful wedding
dresses are now running down the final straightaway!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Finish! Our five muses have given us a brilliant display of running! Just
listen to the crowd go wild!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Aw, I lost! But that was really fun!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
"Fun..." You're right. My body felt so light in this dress that I started
pushing past my limits before I even realized.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey everyone, what'd you think of my wedding dress? ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I thank all of you for your support. This race has been very special for
me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: (Curren and Fine are both stunning...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: (But... what about me?)

text_block_list.name: Young Girl
text_block_list.text: Rice, your dress is super cute!

text_block_list.name: Kind Woman
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower! That was some great running! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Just now, they said my name. They said I was cute... and even
thanked me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Everyone's smiling... and they look so happy, too. It's because the muses ran—no, it's because we ran...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad... I really did it! I became one of the muses I'd always
looked up to and made everyone smile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time later, in the Beauty Dream Cup-themed café...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Check it out! The parfaits and cakes are all sooo cute! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: They really are fashioned after our wedding dresses. How splendid, I'm sure this will become a fond memory! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
They're all so cute I can't pick! What should I do? Should I just get
them all?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I understand how you feel, but let's try to show a little restraint. It'd
be a shame if we couldn't fit into our new racewear anymore.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... Urara, Ikuno? If you want, maybe we can share? I'm having
trouble choosing, too...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In that case, allow me to join in as well. This is a rare opportunity for
me to share cuisine among friends!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If we're all sharing, then let's just order everything! Once the cakes
get here, I wanna snap a shot with everyone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure my followers on Umastagram will love it! Let's see, the
hashtags will be...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#PartyTime #BeautyDreamCafe #SpecialSweets #TheCutestMuses"
...Perfect! ♪
